---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for the NYC Taxi DLT pipeline
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature or improvement you'd like.

## Problem It Solves
Describe the problem or limitation this feature addresses.

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you'd like this to work.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or examples here.
